author: George W.
name: GW Dense KV2 MLP1248 Int7Mid45 LowerLR
blurb: Focused non-record candidate for Parameter Golf. It reduces KV heads from 4 to 2, reinvests the saved budget into MLP_HIDDEN=1248, uses the public lower-LR schedule, lowers the keep-float quantizer threshold so the smaller K/V matrices are actually quantized, and applies a gentler int7-style coarsening to layers 4 and 5. The staged metrics come from the best of three local Apple Silicon proxy seeds.
